validation_results.summary: created build lock parses as valid JSON

validation_results.command:
PYTHONPATH=repository/src python3 - <<'PY2'
import json
from pathlib import Path
from drd_harness.validators.phase_gate import canonical_lock_root, validate_build_lock_readiness
lock=json.loads(Path('control/locks/P4_BUILD_LOCK.json').read_text())
assert not validate_build_lock_readiness(lock)
assert lock['root_sha256'] == canonical_lock_root(lock)
print('PASS')
PY2
validation_results.summary: validate_build_lock_readiness returns zero findings and root hash recomputes

validation_results.command:
PYTHONPATH=repository/src python3 - <<'PY2'
import hashlib, json
from pathlib import Path
lock=json.loads(Path('control/locks/P4_BUILD_LOCK.json').read_text())
def sha(path):
    h=hashlib.sha256(); h.update(Path(path).read_bytes()); return h.hexdigest()
for entry in lock['files']:
    assert sha(entry['path']) == entry['sha256'], entry['path']
assert sha('control/locks/P4_SPEC_LOCK.json') == lock['spec_lock_hash']
print('PASS')
PY2
validation_results.summary: every build lock file entry and the upstream spec lock hash match current files

validation_results.command: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; root=Path('build_program/phases/P4/candidates/P4-BUILD-LOCK-CREATION-RESULT'); scope=json.loads((root/'SCOPE_REPORT.json').read_text()); assert Path(scope['created_control_lock']).is_file(); assert all(Path(p).is_file() for p in scope['actual_writes']); assert not scope['forbidden_write_violations']; assert scope['control_files_modified'] is True; assert scope['repository_files_modified'] is False; assert scope['release_lock_created'] is False; print('PASS')"
